word: H6255 - עַשְׁתְּרֹת קַרְנַיִם - ʻAshtᵉrôth Qarnayim - ash-ter-oth' kar-nah'-yim - Ashtoreth Karnaim

sections.paragraph:
Original: עשׁתּרת קרנים

Transliteration: ‛ashterôth qarnayim

Phonetic: ash-ter-oth' kar-nah'-yim

BDB Definition:

Ashtoreth-karnaim = "Ashtoreth of the two horns or peaks"
  1. a city in Bashan east of the Jordan given to Manasseh

Origin: from H6252 and the dual of H7161

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
